# Developer Documentation

Get tutorials, guides, and API references to kickstart your business with PhonePe Payment Gateway and storefront integrations.

## Accept Payments Online

Integrate PhonePe PG into your website or app and accept payments easily.

[Explore Payment Gateway](/phonepe-docs-md/payment-gateway.md)

Mobile Integration

Add PhonePe PG to your app using SDKs for native and hybrid platforms. Designed for quick setup and compatibility with modern app architectures.

![](/static/mobileIntegration-40a4f313cdd5dc2fa614dce94ee42b2c.webp)

Web Integration

Explore pre-built checkout solutions or create a custom payment experience on your website backed by PhonePe's secure infrastructure.

![](/static/webIntegration-c643cf7ff8e7425ad10bc93a974eebcb.webp)

Comprehensive Solutions

Scale with PhonePe's suite of products, including Autopay, Payment Links, and more, designed to keep your business ahead of the rest.

![](/static/comprehensiveSolutions-ffa6243b436f5994fd77cd05fe10a448.webp)

Plugin Integrations

No-code solutions for popular platforms like Shopify, WooCommerce, Magento, and so on.

![](/static/pluginIntegrations-66bcd460c60dcaa12465069fc7af1a49.webp)

![](/static/inStorePayments-8fb87010e110363f69068e306d22a2d8.webp)![](/static/inStorePaymentsMobile-1ff6adbd25568acd6244fb3124e28fb8.webp)

## Accept In-store Payments

Power in-store transactions with cashless payments via Static QR, Smart Speakers, and EDC devices. Use Dynamic QR, Integrated EDCs, and much more to simplify setup, alerts, and reconciliation.

[Explore In-store Payments](/phonepe-docs-md/offline-integration.md)
